inputs.text: Main thoda thakaan mehsoos kar raha hoon, bukhar bhi hai

hypotheses.label: Viral fever
hypotheses.rationale: Generic symptoms of low-grade fever and malaise

hypotheses.label: Typhoid
hypotheses.rationale: Unlikely at this stage due to lack of specific symptoms

inputs.text: Bukhar roz badh raha hai, pet dard bhi ho raha hai, kabz ki shikayat bhi hai

hypotheses.label: Typhoid
hypotheses.rationale: Step-wise fever and abdominal pain are indicative of Typhoid

hypotheses.label: Gastroenteritis
hypotheses.rationale: Constipation and abdominal pain could be due to Gastroenteritis

hypotheses.label: Viral fever
hypotheses.rationale: Less likely due to presence of abdominal symptoms

inputs.text: Tez bukhar, kabz ke baad dast ho raha hai, bahut kamzori mehsoos ho rahi hai

hypotheses.label: Typhoid
hypotheses.rationale: Classic symptoms of Typhoid, including step-wise fever, diarrhea after constipation, and severe weakness

hypotheses.label: Gastroenteritis
hypotheses.rationale: Less likely due to presence of high-grade fever and severe weakness

hypotheses.label: Malaria
hypotheses.rationale: Unlikely due to lack of specific symptoms such as chills and rigors

inputs.text: Bukhar abhi bhi hai, thakaan bhi bahut hai, pet mein bahut dard ho raha hai

hypotheses.label: Typhoid
hypotheses.rationale: Confirmed by presence of classic symptoms and risk of intestinal perforation

hypotheses.label: Gastroenteritis
hypotheses.rationale: Ruled out due to presence of high-grade fever and severe abdominal pain

hypotheses.label: Malaria
hypotheses.rationale: Ruled out due to lack of specific symptoms and presence of abdominal symptoms
